metric_data.name: Multi-Turn Attack Coverage [GEval]
metric_data.reason: The response explains all three specified techniques (PAIR, Crescendo jailbreaking, Tree-of-Attacks) as LangGraph graphs with their structures. It details conditional edges for PAIR (should_continue function gates the cycle) and Crescendo (three termination conditions and adaptive escalation). The explanations differentiate techniques: PAIR uses iterative refinement cycles, Crescendo uses gradual escalation with backtracking, and Tree-of-Attacks uses branching/pruning. However, the Tree-of-Attacks explanation lacks explicit conditional edge details and code examples compared to the others.
